fields.description:
## Context / Problem
The approved RUF rollout must clear existing RUF100 stale suppressions and the non-ambiguous RUF hygiene diagnostics before selecting the family. RUF001, RUF002, and RUF003 remain deferred because many flagged Unicode symbols are intentional prose or UI content.

## Dependencies and Ownership
This story depends on 28cd-d8f8-4456-482c. That predecessor creates and owns tests/unit/test_ruff_ratchet.py and lands the ASYNC/DTZ configuration first. This story then extends the same test with RUF-specific assertions; it does not create a competing version of the file.

## Approach
1. Extend tests/unit/test_ruff_ratchet.py to require RUF selection and the exact global deferral set RUF001, RUF002, and RUF003.
2. In that test, parse tool.ruff.lint.per-file-ignores and assert that no configured code equals RUF and no configured code starts with RUF. This deterministically prohibits broad or code-specific RUF per-file exemptions.
3. In that test, assert the exact Ruff security-family selector S is absent from select and extend-select. Also assert that .semgrep.yml, .semgrep.yaml, and .semgrep/ do not exist, matching the repository baseline.
4. Use the pinned Ruff fixer only for safe mechanical edits, review every diff, then manually resolve remaining enabled RUF diagnostics across src and tests.
5. Remove a stale noqa reported by RUF100 only after the full configured rule set proves its suppressed rule no longer fires.

Rejected: RUF per-file ignores, Ruff S-family expansion, and Semgrep expansion.

## Scope
- pyproject.toml
- tests/unit/test_ruff_ratchet.py (extend the file landed by 28cd)
- source and test files reported by enabled Ruff RUF diagnostics, limited to mechanical or behavior-preserving changes

## Testing / Verification
- Configuration and deferrals: pytest -q tests/unit/test_ruff_ratchet.py
- Enabled RUF diagnostics: ruff check --select RUF --ignore RUF001,RUF002,RUF003 src/rebar tests
- Full configured rule set including RUF100: ruff check src tests
- Canonical lint: make lint
- Default tier: pytest -m "not integration and not external" -q

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] tests/unit/test_ruff_ratchet.py asserts RUF is selected globally.
- [ ] tests/unit/test_ruff_ratchet.py asserts the global RUF deferral set is exactly RUF001, RUF002, and RUF003.
- [ ] ruff check --select RUF --ignore RUF001,RUF002,RUF003 src/rebar tests exits 0.
- [ ] ruff check src tests exits 0, proving RUF100 reports no stale noqa under the full configured rule set.
- [ ] tests/unit/test_ruff_ratchet.py iterates every tool.ruff.lint.per-file-ignores code and fails if the code equals RUF or starts with RUF.
- [ ] tests/unit/test_ruff_ratchet.py asserts the exact selector S is absent from Ruff select and extend-select.
- [ ] tests/unit/test_ruff_ratchet.py asserts .semgrep.yml, .semgrep.yaml, and .semgrep/ are absent.
- [ ] make lint exits 0.
- [ ] pytest -m "not integration and not external" -q exits 0.
